programme.title: Live: PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: The RBC Heritage 2026 Round 3 takes place at Harbour Town Golf Links in Hilton Head Island. Justin Thomas, the defending champion, looks to become the first repeat winner since Stewart Cink. The player compete for a prize purse of $20 million.

programme.desc: Weekend news coverage.

programme.desc: Tony Dokoupil shares the day's most important stories, delivering context and depth to bring greater understanding to one's world.

programme.desc: News and features about performers, productions and the milieu.

programme.title: Tracker
programme.desc: Injured and framed for a string of murders, Colter, cut off from Reenie and Randy, must rely on unexpected ally Billie to stop a relentless assassin, uncovering a murky truth where justice and vengeance blur.

programme.title: CIA
programme.desc: When a deeply embedded U.S. intelligence officer is detained in Hong Kong, Nikki insists on traveling there to bring him home.

programme.desc: Photos discovered on an old cell phone help solve the disappearance of a 14-year-old girl.

programme.title: Now Boarding: Jets 2026 NFL Draft Preview
programme.desc: Eric Allen and top insiders preview the 2026 NFL Draft. With two first round picks, who will the Jets target when they are on the clock in April?

programme.title: Fire Country
programme.desc: Bode and Jake respond to a lighthouse rescue operation that turns into a mission to prevent a ship from crashing during an intense storm; Eve investigates the origins of a flu outbreak at Three Rock.

programme.desc: Bode and his aunt, Sheriff Mickey Fox, investigate the attempted murder of her estranged father, Wes Fox.

programme.desc: An in-depth look at topics from politics to personal finance, featuring watchdog reports about government corruption and failures, consumer alerts and health care issues.

programme.title: Healthy Joints for Life With Rich Diana
programme.desc: Healthy Joints for Life! Episode 1 of world-renowned orthopedist and longevity researcher Dr. Rich Diana's new series on healthy aging; learn about the real causes behind joint aging, and the promising new drug, supplement and therapy options.

programme.title: CBS News Sunday Morning
programme.desc: The number of judges who have left the immigration courts; the surging number of deadly truck accidents; the home and furniture design studio of the late George Nakashima; companies that are inventing new technologies to improve the environment; portrait artist Michael Shane Neal; singing car salesman Andrew Hiers; actors Don Cheadle and Ayo Edebiri.

programme.title: Face the Nation
programme.desc: Mike Waltz, U.S. ambassador to the United Nations; former Attorney General Eric Holder; Amos Hochstein, former White House adviser on global infrastructure; former U.S. Surgeon General Dr. Jerome Adams.

programme.desc: Highlights from the Madrid E-Prix held at Circuito de Madrid Jarama.

programme.title: PBR Bull Riding
programme.desc: Highlights from April 17 & 18, 2026 in Billings, Mont.

programme.title: Chasing Sunday: THE PLAYERS Championship
programme.desc: Unprecedented, week-long access to TOUR pros who agreed to be mic'd up during all four rounds of competition. Follow TOUR winners Akshay Bhatia, Rickie Fowler, Si Woo Kim, and Chris Gotterup as they navigate the pressure, preparation and pivotal moments at TPC Sawgrass - from inside the ropes and inside their heads.

programme.title: Live: PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: The RBC Heritage 2026 Final Round determines the winner of a $20 million purse and 700 FedEx Cup points at Harbour Town Golf Links. Justin Thomas, the defending champion, looks for a rare back-to-back victory at Hilton Head Island.

programme.title: Joni Table Talk

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: CBS News Roundup
programme.desc: The headlines one needs to know overnight... plus, a roundup of MoneyWatch, health, consumer and up-to-the-minute technology news, the latest weather, and inspiring stories of kindness and hope.

programme.desc: CBS News Mornings broadcasts on weekdays and offers viewers up-to-date news, comprehensive weather forecasts, and highlights from the world of sports.

programme.title: The Young and the Restless
programme.desc: Lily asks Devon and Nate to see Holden in a new light; Billy and Sally process their new normal; Stephanie connects with an old friend.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful
programme.desc: Set in the glamorous world of the Los Angeles fashion scene, this soap opera focuses on the wealthy and powerful Forrester family; its company, Forrester Creations, is the leader in the fashion industry.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Dani confronts Andre about his run-in with Bill; Chelsea turns down her mother's offer; Leslie and Vanessa bond; Smitty has a new lead to share with Jacob; Derek and Ashley have a heated exchange about Grayson.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: A Lesson in Lending; Head-Splitting Breakup!
programme.desc: A young defendant tells an unbelievable story about how his sister "offered" to help pay for his girlfriend's boat; an ex-lover accuses a disabled woman of false arrest for assault.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: Used Car Chaos!; Mom Goes After Daughter
programme.desc: A woman says a man scammed her on the sale of a used car; a woman sues her daughter for a car's down payment and repairs.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: A battle over stray felines turns into a full-blown cat-astrophe! A landlord claims her neighbor scared off tenants, unleashed bad reviews and fed a bunch of stray cats. The neighbor argues she's the real menace who calls the authorities just to cause trouble. Watch as the judges claw out the truth!

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: A couple say their mechanic received money from their insurance company, outsourced their car repair to someone else for a lower price, then pocketed the difference.

programme.desc: Evening news coverage.

programme.desc: Calvin reluctantly agrees to dog-sit a glamorous little companion, only to face an awkward twist when someone else lays claim to it; a joint celebration prompts Malcolm to question whether he and Mercedes are moving too fast.

programme.title: DMV
programme.desc: Colette tries to bridge a growing divide at the office by bringing the driving examiners and counter clerks together; Vic stubbornly avoids seeing a doctor after an unusual injury, forcing Barb to get creative to help him.

programme.desc: When a single mother and her son are abducted while visiting a state park, Maggie brings in Peter Olsen to help profile their suspect; as the team works, they make a harrowing discovery about an old case.

programme.title: The Late Show With Stephen Colbert

programme.title: Comics Unleashed With Byron Allen
programme.desc: Host and comedian Byron Allen invites four A-List comedians to this round-table comedy talk show. Guest comedians share their own funny perspectives on current events, everyday life, pop culture, entertainment and more. Filmed in front of a live audience in Hollywood, previous guests have included: Dennis Miller, Tom Arnold, Howie Mandel, Jon Lovitz and Cedric the Entertainer.

programme.title: Comics Unleashed With Byron Allen
programme.desc: Host and comedian Byron Allen invites four A-List comedians to this round-table comedy talk show.
